originalAlarm.description: Value stored to 'xGridSpacing' during its initialization is never read

model:
(define-fun AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID () Bool
  false)
(define-fun ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING () Bool
  true)
reasoning: e30bfedce4d.c L24: xGridSpacing dead store. xGridSpacing is assigned at L24 but never subsequently used. The real condition: ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T (which implies AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID via #define at L1-3). The PC covers both AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID=T and AUTO_BED_LEVELING_GRID=F with ENABLE_AUTO_BED_LEVELING=T — but ENABLE=T AND GRID=F is contradictory (ENABLE=T automatically defines GRID). This non-compilable config is included in the PC, making it over-constrained. New bug.
